description: Input schema for Grok video extension.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing what should happen in the extended portion of the video.
examples: The camera continues to pan across the landscape
The person turns and walks away
prompt.title: Prompt

video.description: Input video to extend. Must be a publicly accessible URL.
video.title: Video

duration.description: Duration of the extended video in seconds (1-15). If not specified, defaults to model's default.
duration.title: Duration

title: AppInput
